Petition For Approval Of Settlement Agreement; And To Modify Court?S 2007 Order Regarding Unitrust Conversion
Off Calendar Aug-18-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Howard Slavitt, via Zoom, for Mechanics Bank, Petitioner; Seth Skootsky, via Zoom, for Suzanne Haynes, Beneficiary; Erika Gasaway, via Zoom, for Richard Haynes, Marsha Hannay, Elwood Haynes, Jr., and Deborah Ramsden, Remainder Beneficiaries.

Both Ms. Haynes and Mr. Skootsky advise that they are appearing to advise the court that their respective clients do not oppose the instant petition.

The matter is taken under submission.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Bastain. Not Reported.

Petition For Approval Of Settlement Agreement; And To Modify Court?S 2007 Order Regarding Unitrust Conversion

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar May-19-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing. Commissioner William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

Charles P. Wolff, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Citigroup Trust - Delaware, N.A., successor in interest to Citicorp Turst Bank, FSB. ("Citicorp").
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on January 22, 2008.

Good cause appearing, Citigroup's Second Amended First Account and Report for the period from the inception of the Trust through November 30, 2005, is settled, allowed and approved. Additionally, all acts and transactions set forth in the Second Amended First Account and Report are approved and confirmed.

Order Settling Second Amended First Account was submitted to and signed by the Court.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar May-19-2008 Assigned To Trial Court

PETITION FOR APPOINTMENT OF SUCCESSOR TRUSTEE
Off Calendar Jan-22-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Keith Bitler for Suzanne Haynes. Charles Wolff for Citicorp. Monica Dell'Oso for Remainder Beneficiaries.

The parties stated that there were some remaining issues regarding the accounting and requested the matter be set for trial. The matter was referred to the Presiding Judge to set for trial, (order for the same signed in open court).

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR# 11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Lee.

MINI MINUTES: Keith Bilter appearing for Susanne Haynes. Monica Dell'Osso appearing for remainder beneficiaries. Charles Wolff appearing for trustee Citicorp. Trial will take more than one day. Matter is referred to the Presiding Judge to set for trial. Order signed. Mr. Wolff wanted to make it clear that the matter being referred for trial is to convert into a unitrust. All counsel agreed.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Handa.

MINI MINUTES: Keith Bilter appearing for Susanne Haynes. Charles Wolff appearing for trustee Citi Corp. Monica Dell'Osso appearing for remainder beneficiaries. Parties have done Discovery. Ms. Dell'Osso wants a trial date. Counsel are not sure if they can finish the trial in two half day. Matter is continued to 6/13 for Judge Dearman to set trial date. PETITION FOR APPOINTMENT OF SUCCESSOR TRUSTEE
Off Calendar Mar-06-2007 Continued To May-30-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Keith Bilter appearing for susanne Haynes. Charles Wolff appearing for trustee Citi Corp. Monica Dell'Osso appearing for remainder beneficiaries. Discovery is not completed. Issues on unitrust conversion and appointment of successor trustee addressed. Mr. Bilter wants a successor trustee appointed today. Mr. Wolff has no position on the issue. Ms. Dell'Osso argued that the appointment of a successor trustee should wait until a decision on the unitrust conversion. The trustee will continue to act until a successor is appointed. Matter is continued to 5/30.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: J. Peralta.

MINI MINUTES: Keith Bilter appearing for Suzanne Haynes. Thomas Latham and Michael Burnstein appearing for trustee Citicorp. Monica Dell'Osso appearing for remainder beneficiaries. Counsel agree to continue the accounting. Mr. Latham agrees to informal response to document production. Parties can not agree to the appointment of the successor trustee. Court is continuing all matters to 8/23 for status. If the parties can not agree on the successor trustee, each side to submit names for the Court's consideration. Judge: John Dearman.
